attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RN)+NFRT.MAX_FDI_REV_TRX_KEY AS FDI_REVENUE_TRX_KEY,
T.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
,T.FUNC_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE   
,T.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NAME         
,T.SHIPPED_DATE                                      
,T.TRANSACTION_NUMBER         
,T.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST  
,T.USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
,T.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER   
,T.PO_TYPE
,T.ORDER_NUMBER                     
,T.ORDER_QTY                     
,T.GL_POSTED_DATE                  
,T.PRODUCT_ID        
,T.BATCH_SOURCE_NAME             
,T.BUSINESS_ENTITY            
,T.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,T.TRANSACTION_DATE                
,T.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_NAME
,T.SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG
,T.END_CUSTOMER_NAME             
,T.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME         
,T.ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,T.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE            
,T.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT          
,T.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,T.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,T.PRODUCT_KEY
,T.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,T.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
,T.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
,T.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,T.EDW_CREATE_DTM
,T.EDW_CREATE_USER
,T.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,T.EDW_UPDATE_USER
,T.USD_EXTENDED_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,T.USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE
,T.USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST
,T.USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE
,T.USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE
,T.USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,T.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,T.EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY
,T.EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY
,T.EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,T.USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE
,T.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE
,T.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE
,T.CONTRACT_NUMBER
,T.CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY
,T.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
T.DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_AMT /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
FROM
(
SELECT 
RANDOM(1,100000000) RN,
CASE WHEN CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'  ELSE CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG END AS CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
,FUNC_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE   
,SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NAME         
,SHIPPED_DATE                                      
,TRANSACTION_NUMBER         
,USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST  
,USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER   
,CASE WHEN PO_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE
,ORDER_NUMBER                     
,EXTENDED_QUANTITY  AS ORDER_QTY                 
,GL_POSTED_DATE                  
,PRODUCT_ID        
,BATCH_SOURCE_NAME             
,BUSINESS_ENTITY            
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_CLASS IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE ACCOUNT_CLASS END AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
,TRANSACTION_DATE                
,END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_NAME
,CASE WHEN SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'  ELSE SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG END AS SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG
,END_CUSTOMER_NAME             
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME         
,CASE WHEN ACQUISITION_SOURCE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE ACQUISITION_SOURCE END AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,RFMT.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE            
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT          
,RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,CASE WHEN FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE END AS FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,CASE WHEN PRODUCT_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE PRODUCT_KEY END AS PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER END AS GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE END AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
,CASE WHEN FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE END AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,USD_EXTENDED_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE
,USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST
,USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE
,USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE
,USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY
,EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY
,EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE
,USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE
,USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE
,CONTRACT_NUMBER
,CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
/* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
/*CASE WHEN SFRT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'As Invoiced' THEN ( ZEROIFNULL(SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE) -(CASE WHEN SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY IN ('CM', 'DM') 
THEN ZEROIFNULL(SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE) ELSE 0 END) ) ELSE 0 END AS DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_AMT*/
SFRT.DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT AS DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_REVENUE_TRX SFRT, 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT
WHERE SFRT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND SFRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL
/*UNION ALL
SELECT  
RANDOM(1,100000000) RN,
CASE WHEN CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'  ELSE CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG END AS CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
,FUNC_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE   
,SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NAME         
,SHIPPED_DATE                                      
,TRANSACTION_NUMBER 
 ,CASE WHEN SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST  *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST
,USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER   
,CASE WHEN PO_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE
,ORDER_NUMBER                     
,EXTENDED_QUANTITY  AS ORDER_QTY                   
,GL_POSTED_DATE                  
,PRODUCT_ID        
,BATCH_SOURCE_NAME             
,BUSINESS_ENTITY            
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_CLASS IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE ACCOUNT_CLASS END AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
,TRANSACTION_DATE                
,END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_NAME
,CASE WHEN SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'  ELSE SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG END AS SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG
,END_CUSTOMER_NAME             
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME         
,CASE WHEN ACQUISITION_SOURCE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'  ELSE ACQUISITION_SOURCE END AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,RFMT.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT            
,RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT                   
,CASE WHEN FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE END AS FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,CASE WHEN PRODUCT_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE PRODUCT_KEY END AS PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER END AS GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE END AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
,CASE WHEN FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK'  ELSE FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE END AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,USD_EXTENDED_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,CASE WHEN SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 ELSE SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE
,CASE WHEN SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST
,CASE WHEN SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE
,USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE
,CASE WHEN SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN SFRT. EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY
,CASE WHEN SFRT. EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT. EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY
,EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,CASE WHEN SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE
,CASE WHEN SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE*COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE
,CASE WHEN SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) IS NULL THEN 0.00000000000000 
ELSE SFRT. USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE *COALESCE(WCCM.PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,1) END USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE
,CONTRACT_NUMBER
,CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY
,RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
-- Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix
--CASE WHEN SFRT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'As Invoiced' THEN ( ZEROIFNULL(SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE) -(CASE WHEN SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY IN ('CM', 'DM') 
--THEN ZEROIFNULL(SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE) ELSE 0 END) ) ELSE 0 END AS DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_AMT
SFRT.DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT AS DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_REVENUE_TRX SFRT 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT 
 ON SFRT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WEBEX_CISCO_COMPANY_MAP WCCM
 ON  SFRT.THEATER = WCCM.THEATER
 AND SFRT.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = WCCM.CISCO_COMPANY
WHERE SFRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NULL*/
) T,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FDI_REVENUE_TRX_KEY),0) AS MAX_FDI_REV_TRX_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FDI_REVENUE_TRX) NFRT

SELECT 
 SFRT.BATCH_ID
,SFRT.UNIQUE_ROW_ID
,SFRT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,SFRT.ACQUISITION_SOURCE
,SFRT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,SFRT.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
,SFRT.PRODUCT_KEY
,SFRT.SERVICE_PRODUCT_FLAG
,SFRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SFRT.TMS_PHV_LEVEL_4_ID
,SFRT.PRODUCT_ID
,SFRT.BUSINESS_ENTITY
,SFRT.CUSTOMER_ID
,SFRT.END_CUSTOMER_ID
,SFRT.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID
,SFRT.THEATER
,SFRT.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
,SFRT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID
,SFRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,SFRT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID
,SFRT.BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,SFRT.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DATE
,SFRT.CONTRACT_NUMBER
,SFRT.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
,SFRT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
,SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY
,SFRT.CUSTOMER_TRX_TYPE_ID
,SFRT.END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SFRT.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_NAME
,SFRT.EXTENDED_GROSS_QUANTITY
,SFRT.EXTENDED_NET_QUANTITY
,SFRT.EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,SFRT.FISCAL_TRANSACTION_DATE
,SFRT.FUNC_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,SFRT.FUNC_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RATE
,SFRT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,SFRT.GL_DATE
,SFRT.GL_POSTED_DATE
,SFRT.HEADER_ID
,SFRT.INV_TO_FUNC_CONVERSION_RATE
,SFRT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
,SFRT.INVOICE_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,SFRT.LINE_CREATION_DATE
,SFRT.LINE_ID
,SFRT.LINE_TYPE
,SFRT.ORDER_NUMBER
,SFRT.PO_TYPE
,SFRT.POSTING_CONTROL_ID
,SFRT.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,SFRT.SERVICE_TYPE
,SFRT.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NAME
,SFRT.SHIPPED_DATE
,SFRT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SFRT.TRANSACTION_DATE
,SFRT.TRANSACTION_NUMBER
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_BASE_PRICE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_BASE_PRICE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_COST
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_GROSS_REVENUE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_INVOICE_AMOUNT
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_BASE_PRICE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_COST
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_NET_REVENUE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_SELLING_PRICE
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
,SFRT.USD_EXTENDED_STANDARD_PRICE
,SFRT.USD_FREIGHT
,SFRT.USD_TAX
,SFRT.CREATE_DATE
,SFRT.CREATE_DATETIME
,SFRT.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SFRT.DV_SHIPMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FDI_TD_REVENUE_TRX SFRT
WHERE SFRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
WHERE 
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SFRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)

SELECT 
 -1 AS BATCH_ID,
 WEBEX_COMPANY,
 CISCO_COMPANY,
 COMPANY_DESC,
 FINANCIAL_COMPANY_KEY,
 THEATER,
 SL6_DESCRIPTION,
 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 SALES_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
 SUB_SALES_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
 PERCENTAGE_SPLIT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
 ACTION_CODE,
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WEBEX_CISCO_COMPANY_MAP  WCCM
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
WHERE 
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WCCM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)

SELECT CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY PRODUCT_KEY,
    -9999 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
    -9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
    CAST (TRIM(COALESCE(NFRT.CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || TRIM(COALESCE(NFRT.CISCO_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' ||-9999|| '~' ||-9999 AS VARCHAR(70))DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FDI_REVENUE_TRX NFRT, 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT 
WHERE RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE  IN (0,1,2,3)  
    AND NFRT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
    AND NFRT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT  = RFMT.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
    /*AND DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD NOT IN ( 
SELECT DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT  ) */

and NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
                FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_REVENUE MT
                WHERE MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD = DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD)

GROUP BY 1,2,5
